title: lepidadenia seloang
intro: Lepidadenia seloang, a species of plant in the family Lamiaceae, is also known as Seloang or Seluang, and is native to Southeast Asia. It has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Lepidadenia seloang include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Lepidadenia seloang is typically prepared for medicinal use through the process of steaming the leaves and roots, which are then used to make herbal teas or infusions.
